creator: till@php.net
text:
An updated tarball is available from launchpad:
http://launchpad.net/mysql-proxy/trunk/0.7.0/+download/mysql-proxy-0.7.0.tar.gz

I think a note should be added to post-install that this release contains changes to internal objects in the lua layer. This may not be a drop-in replacement for 0.6.1. 

On a side-note, this release also contains notable performance improvements over 0.6.1.
